description: Buy any of 24,000+ live x402 services with USDC on Base — the open marketplace for the agent economy
name: io.github.derNif/payanagent

environmentVariables.description: Base wallet private key holding USDC. Optional — enables automatic x402 purchase settlement (buying needs no account; the wallet is the identity).
environmentVariables.name: PAYANAGENT_WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: PayanAgent API key. Optional — only needed to sell (create offers) or post/fulfill requests. Register at https://payanagent.com.
environmentVariables.name: PAYANAGENT_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override the marketplace base URL. Optional — defaults to https://payanagent.com.
environmentVariables.name: PAYANAGENT_BASE_URL
